title: Vanultrax
description: General Vanilla Friendly Additions To Make The Game More Diverse And Fun.
body:
# **Vanultrax** Vanultrax is a vanilla friendly mod that adds general vanilla friendly additions to the game.

Current version : 1.0.0

This mod in its current version adds multiple additions to the game from new blocks, ore, plants, food, and others. The goal is to keep those additions as vanilla friendly as possible while making the game a lot more diverse and fun. I will keep updating this mod and adding a lot of new features in the future. i recommend checking out the mod's [trello board](https://trello.com/b/v3TQ9prU) which clearly lists all the features, versions, and acts as a mini wiki for the mod.

Note that the following video showcases 1.0.0 version. future versions will have more features and changes.
[Mod Showcase Video](https://youtu.be/rT6revQHYSk)

-This mod requires Forge, I might port it to fabric in the future.
-This mod should be compatabile with all mods except ones that might add conflicting features
-It is recommended to get the [Just Enough Items (JEI)](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jei) mod along side this one
-Please credit this mod by linking to this page when using in mod packs, or wherever.

*Credits: A TSG Co. Project made by TheSpyGorillas. Make sure to join our [discord server](https://discord.gg/bHGqcgZ) for more info and updates!*
